Localization.Description: Execution of certain SQL commands may indicate reconnaissance of the internal structure of the MySQL database, which may indicate attacker activity

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User "{subject.account.name}" executed an SQL command to retrieve information about the available MySQL functions on host {event_src.host}
User "{subject.account.name}" executed an SQL command to retrieve information about MySQL database schemas on host {event_src.host}
User "{subject.account.name}" executed an SQL command to retrieve information about MySQL database version on host {event_src.host}
